items.title: [正面] art is good, story is sick AND sickening (which is...
items.summary:
art is good, story is sick AND sickening (which is perfect for me), gacha system is pretty generous. exploration can be annoying and repetitive sometimes, but very chill gameplay overall.
_

the biggest turn off after which i just dropped the game for a while was a mess happening after chapter 6 forward. like what do you mean you've just killed one of the most important characters in the most stupid way possible? i come back and dude is simply dead. and no one mourns him, like, at all.

look, i'm not a believer in good story in gacha games in general, but that was horrible even for me.
_

will i continue to play this game? for some time, yeah. do i recommend it? i mean, it doesn't hurt to try if you like rogue-like card games. 

i'm just here for Tulu and Pollux, that's basically it.

items.summary:
Morimens is anime Slay the Spire with a gacha system collecting cute waifus.

This is a great distraction from watching Hentai!
